caption:
✨ You won't believe the energy on the rooftop tonight! 🌙📚

It's 11 PM, and while the campus is quiet, our Astrophysics crew is anything but. Tonight was the secret calibration session of the century! 🔥 I wore my signature burgundy set: a structured silk blouse that lifts and supports my bust, keeping everything perfectly hidden under the fabric with zero cleavage, tucked into a high-waisted pencil skirt that hugs my hips and smooths over my curves 🍑✨. Paired with my chic ankle boots, of course 👢.

The heat was rising—not just from the machinery! 💦 I had to lean in close to adjust the telescope lens, back arched, reaching up... the silk stretched just enough to show the sleek line of my torso while the skirt clung to my shape. The boys were mesmerized, watching every move I made. 😏

Then came the moment! I stepped onto the railing to grab a loose calibration rod, balancing effortlessly. Looking back at the group over my shoulder, I caught a few dropped jaws and flushed cheeks 📸💫. The city lights framed my silhouette perfectly. Physics is about gravity, but tonight? The attraction was the only force that mattered. 🧲✨

Who's volunteering to help me lower the scope tomorrow? Don't be shy... unless you are! 😈👇

#TeacherLife #UniversityVibes #SexyProfessor #RooftopSessions #Astrophysics #FacultyStyle #OfficeHoursAfterDark #CurvesAndChalk #AcademicAttraction #BurgundyStyle
